rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Moton To Dismiss For Failure To Amend, Or In The Alternative, Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 12, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT AMERIPRISE BANK's Motion on To Dismiss For Failure To Amend, Or In The Alternative, Demurrer To First Amended Complaint Continued to August 12, 2013. Moving party is ordered again (See CGC-13-529041) to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of Second Amended Complaint. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of opposition. All papers must be delivered to Department 501 no later than July 26, 2013 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN ARMOR VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AS THE ORIGINATOR
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 12, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to August 12, 2013. Moving party is ordered again (See CGC-13-529041) to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of Second Amended Complaint. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of opposition. All papers must be delivered to Department 501 no later than July 26, 2013 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARMEN VALDEZ-MADRANOS VS. MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP, A BUSINESS ENTITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Re-Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 12, 2013, line 3. PLAINTIFF CARMEN VALDEZ-MADRANOS' Amended Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions DENIED. Motion is untimely per CCP 2031.310, also see Sperber v. Robinson (1994) 26 Cal.App.4th 736. No sanctions. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BMGV, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY et al VS. FRANK YI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 12, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT FRANK YI, AS TRUSTEE OF THE FRANK AND SANDRA YI's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT DENIED. Request for punitive damages is sufficiently alleged. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BMGV, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY et al VS. FRANK YI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 12, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT FRANK YI, AS TRUSTEE OF THE FRANK AND SANDRA YI's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED, in part, and OVERRULED, in part. Demurrer is OVERRULED as to first cause of action for fraudulent concealment. This cause of action is sufficiently alleged and challenging the veracity of allegations is not proper on demurrer. Demurrer is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND as to the second cause of action for breach of contract to allege damages to signatory/beneficiary under the Lease. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ARTHUR ERMISCH et al VS. KATHLEEN LUSHER et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 12, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT MAMITA PRIMICIAS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges cause of action for partition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ARTHUR ERMISCH et al VS. KATHLEEN LUSHER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Change Of Venue
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 12, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT MAMITA PRIMICIAS' Motion For Change Of Venue DENIED. Partition action is properly before this Court. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ARTHUR ERMISCH et al VS. KATHLEEN LUSHER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Deft To Disqualify Ptlf'S Attorneys
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 12, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT MAMITA PRIMICIAS' Motion of Defendant To Disqualify Plaintiff's Attorney DENIED as moot. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TRAVIS CAMPBELL VS. KIMBERLY HATHAWAY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 12, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT JOHN HOFFMAN and KIMBERLY HATHAWAY-SIEGEL's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Estoppel is not asserted as affirmative defense in Defendants answer filed on November 7, 2011. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TISKER, PABLO D., AUTHORIZED AGENT FOR BERNSTEIN et al VS. DALTON MAZUR et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 12, 2013, line 7. DEFENDANT DALTON MAZUR's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained without leave to amend. "3 Day Notice to Quit" was served after unlawful detainer was filed and no leave to file supplemental complaint was granted. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HAPPY OCEAN LLC et al VS. ART WALKER et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 12, 2013, line 8. PLAINTIFF HAPPY OCEAN LLC and POST APPLE LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Hearing Required. Bankruptcy Status Report. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MUFARREH FAMILY TRUST VS. RICCO CHAPA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 12, 2013, line 9. DEFENDANT RICCO CHAPA's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT Continued to July 16, 2013. Moving party to provide courtesy copy of the moving papers no later than July 12, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES, LLC A DELAWARE VS. TERESA SPTHACOOLEY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 12, 2013, line 10. DEFENDANT TERESA SOTHACOOLEY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Overruled. Existence of landlord-tenant relationship and lease agreement is sufficiently alleged. Complaint Paragraph 5. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 12, 2013, line 11. DEFENDANT JAHZEEL RODRIGUEZ DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Overruled, 5 days to answer. Standing is sufficiently alleged. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ETHELJIVE GUEVARA VS. JAHZEEL RODRIGUEZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 12, 2013, line 11. DEFENDANT ROGELIO CARDONA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Overruled, 5 days to answer. Standing is sufficiently alleged. = (501/REQ)
